rejected_samples.reason: RPC shows tx.to is 0xa05405b6340a7f43dc5835351bfc4f5b1f028359 and selector is 0x78f6d597, so it is not a current Pancake Infinity Universal Router execute sample.

External report labels this as failed Universal Router buy, but RPC shows status=1, tx.to=0xa05405b6340a7f43dc5835351bfc4f5b1f028359, selector=0x78f6d597. Reject as current Pancake Infinity Universal Router failure fixture.

open_gap: These samples improve v4 route and same-token ARX buy/sell coverage. The local sellability gate is now implemented in scripts/simulate_pancake_v4_roundtrip_call.py and scripts/alpha_opening_block_watch.py using same-execute UniversalRouter buy->sell eth_call plus TAKE_ALL amountMinimum binary-search recovery-rate measurement. Route samples still do not unlock automatic follow wording by themselves; each launch must pass the live per-token recovery gate plus opening-block, cohort, venue, and distribution rules.
